posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com users!

We are hosting a webinar about monday.com’s CRM on May 16th, 16:00 CEST. This session will be a deep dive into the features the CRM offers, and how powerful the synergy is between Work Management and CRM.

You can register using this link: monday.com CRM Webinar | Discover how monday.com's CRM transforms sales

Hope to see you there!

Regards,
The monday.com team at Xebia, Platinum monday.com partner!
